reviews.review_description: Just got into playing, and my arms are gone.I mean, the movement is horrid and I see how this monster is underwhelming.
At the start I left and then joined back the next day ready good job

Ther is nothing but cheap monsters and its just rooms that are all the same.




meh
This game is my favorite game
Definitely worth it
please add multiplayer

reviews.review_title: I hope you didn’t forget about this game
reviews.review_description: I’m not going to lie this game was amazing but it just needs more levels and multiplayer then it will pop off like noclip vr.
it was a 5
Im going to play this and probaly scream but ill come back later

The lights went out. I ran as fast as I could into a hallway and see, sitting on a table, the screwdriver. I grabbed it instantly and started waiting for my death when I realized that I never picked up the screwdriver. "Hmmm..." I thought. "I could have sworn I picked it up." Then I jumped on it and tried to grab it but my hand kept passing through it like it was nothing. After about ten seconds I had thrown the room into such disarray that if the monster doesn't get me the Cleanup crew would. But I still didn't have the screwdriver. I assumed that I had to wait for the lights to click back on and, as I still didn't hear the monster, waited in the screwdriver room. After the lights came on I still couldn't pick it up. (Also make it so the monster can get into the side rooms on floor 1)

developer_response.body:
oh my, i would fix the issue as fast as i can!
Update, I fixed the issue 3 days ago but i forgot to mention it

reviews.review_description:
I played maybe 10 mins two things I noticed right away. 

1. You can't adjust the graphics at all without the game freaking out making it unplayable unless you put it back to low graphics. I don't understand the point of giving us an option to change graphics.

2. The movement in this game is horrible you move incredibly slow. Running is just as bad you shouldn't of made it where you need to swing your arms to run a button press would of been better.

I'm giving 4 stars because I'm sure these things can be fixed it could be fun especially with friends, I also really like BackRooms lore VR needs a good backrooms game so hopefully this could be it.

Just read title too scary still 
try it out though
It’s a good start. But your so slow you have to swing your arms like crazy to walk a normal speed

reviews.review_title: Easily one of the worst games ive played
reviews.review_description:
The mechanics are fine but IT SUCKS

The enemys are cheap jumpscares that do nothing 

The game barely generated the backrooms (2 rooms at most)

I could easily walk out of the map

Maybe the games supposed to be like this, but i doubt it

DO NOT, DOWNLOAD THIS GAME

[Others have experienced my issue, the dev said that he'd fix it in an 1-4 hours, its been 8 days, so the game is unplayable]

developer_response.body:
sorry for your bad experience with backdoor,
it was because I have been really busy working on the new update with level 1 and 2.
I Fixed the issue!
please give the game one more try!
you could join our discord server for more updates
https://discord.gg/YCYXvcAQ

reviews.review_description: Hello it’s me mr.zacko your game is amazing as you know and just wanted to say good job on getting applab
Very well made game! Just maybe add multiplayer cause it gets kinda repetitive and playing with some friends would fix that! Overall amazing job and keep it up!

hello kinex I really like your game and I really recommend it👍 it has cool levels and it is really scary
When playing with friends it’s so exciting
Good mechanics and nice to see that this game  got on oculus applab.
You guys should definitely download this game
This is a very good game that has a lot of potential. It has good detail and is scary but is fun! I cant wait to see what it holds for the future!
